channel.title: Med Vault: Medical History in 80 Seconds
channel.description: Pandemics, medical scandals, and experiments that changed history. Medicine saves lives. Sometimes it ends them.
channel.itunes:author: Med Vault
channel.itunes:summary: Pandemics, medical scandals, and experiments that changed history. Medicine saves lives. Sometimes it ends them.

item.title: COVID-19 pandemic
item.description: The global COVID-19 pandemic (also known as the coronavirus pandemic), caused by severe acute respiratory syndrome coronavirus 2 (SARS-CoV-2), began with an outbreak in Wuhan, China, in December 2019. It spread to other parts of Asia and then worldwide in early 2020. The World Health Organization (WHO) declared the outbreak a public health emergency of international concern (PHEIC) on 30 January 2
